headline: Seun Steur
body: 🚨⚪️⚫️ Newcastle verbally agree deal to sign Seun Steur for fee over €25m here we go! 18 year old midfielder will join Magpies from Ajax, agreement done overnight and Newcastle planning for medical next. €24m fixed fee, €3m add-ons as Telegraaf reports.
raw_text:
🚨⚪️⚫️ Newcastle verbally agree deal to sign Seun Steur for fee over €25m here we go!

18 year old midfielder will join Magpies from Ajax, agreement done overnight and Newcastle planning for medical next.

€24m fixed fee, €3m add-ons as Telegraaf reports.
text:
🚨⚪️⚫️ Newcastle verbally agree deal to sign Seun Steur for fee over €25m here we go!

18 year old midfielder will join Magpies from Ajax, agreement done overnight and Newcastle planning for medical next.

€24m fixed fee, €3m add-ons as Telegraaf reports.
draft_caption:
✅ TRANSFER- SEUN STEUR CONFIRMED TRANSFER FROM AJAX TO NEWCASTLE UNITED.
💰 PRICE — €25M
📝 CONTRACT — TBD

#NUFC #TransferNews #PremierLeague #FPL
